subcodes.title: Reply to six questions
subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, Who hath known His own Essence through His own Self, and Who hath sanctified His Being beyond the description of aught else beside Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هو الله المتکبر الفرد الوتر. حمداً لله الذی عرف ذاته ذاته و تقدس عن وصف ما دونه بنفسه لم
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @justice and wrath of God, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @absolute freedom; independence of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
